calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-21-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of two minors.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields #7235.
Petitioners Xiulian Zhang and Quanan Liu (mother & father) were present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for the minors: Jia Qian Liu and Jia Xin Liu, and with Cantonese Interpreter: Jie Ying Ming. Petitioners and Interpreter was placed under oath and examined.

Proof of Publication is in the file.
No objections to the proposed change of names were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minors to Lisa Qianqian Liu and Diana Xin Xin Liu.
Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.
